title: HiFi Gibson Assembly (Protocol for the NEBuilder® HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bfb2b","text":"This is the protocol for DNA Assembly using the NEBuilder® HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"72pv5","text":"Optimal Quantities","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fe0bk","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4penp","text":"NEB recommends a total of 0.03–0.2 pmols of DNA fragments when 1 or 2 fragments are being assembled into a vector, and 0.2–0.5 pmols of DNA fragments when 4–6 fragments are being assembled. Efficiency of assembly decreases as the number or length of fragments increases. To calculate the number of pmols of each fragment for optimal assembly, based on fragment length and weight, we recommend the following formula, or using the tool, NEBiocalculator.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":435,"length":15}],"data":[]},{"key":"afkmc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"coh8q","text":"pmols = (weight in ng) x 1,000 / (base pairs x 650 daltons)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fe235","text":"50 ng of 5000 bp dsDNA is about 0.015 pmols","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cv7c9","text":"50 ng of 500 bp dsDNA is about 0.15 pmols","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1n0k6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4rdg1","text":"The mass of each fragment can be measured using the NanoDrop instrument, absorbance at 260 nm or estimated from agarose gel electrophoresis followed by ethidium bromide staining.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"358E01E004B64A08B891E7091B9EDDCC","url":"https://www.neb.com/external-links/nebiocalculator"}}}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"3I9v5","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"98UXk","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":2095,"guid":"4103C79F341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"NEBuilder HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix - 10 rxns","mol_weight":0,"sku":"E2621S","url":"https://www.neb.com/E2621","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":2,"name":"New England Biolabs","link":"https://www.neb.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/2.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/2.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Set up the following reaction on ice (to 20μl total volume): %s %s
Incubate samples in a thermocycler at 50ºC for 15 minutes (when 2 or 3 fragments are being assembled) or 60 minutes (when 4–6 fragments are being assembled).
Following incubation, store samples on ice or at –20ºC for subsequent transformation.
Transform into chemically competent cells (1-5µL) or in electrocompetent cells (1 µL, diluted 10x or 5 µL, after purification to remove salts).
creator: Alba Balletbó
